items.description: Police activity on I-95 southbound between 2 miles SOUTH of Exit 12A/12B: PA 291 CARGO CITY / PHILADELPHIA INT'L AIRPORT and Exit 9B/9A: PA 420 - PROSPECT PARK / ESSINGTON. There is a lane restriction.
